en: These are the generations of Aaron and Moses at the time when the LORD spoke with Moses on Mount Sinai.
zh: 耶和華在西奈山上與摩西說話的日子，亞倫和摩西的後代如下。

en: These are the names of the sons of Aaron: Nadab the firstborn, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
zh: 亞倫的兒子的名字如下：長子是拿答，還有亞比戶、以利亞撒、以他瑪。

en: These are the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, whom he ordained to serve as priests.
zh: 這就是亞倫的兒子的名字，他們是受膏的祭司，是摩西叫他們承受聖職擔任祭司的職分的。

en: But Nadab and Abihu died before the LORD when they offered unauthorized fire before the LORD in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children. So Eleazar and Ithamar served as priests in the lifetime of Aaron their father.
zh: 拿答和亞比戶在西奈曠野把凡火獻在耶和華面前的時候，死在耶和華面前；他們沒有兒子；以利亞撒和以他瑪，就在他們的父親亞倫面前，擔任祭司的職分。

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Bring the tribe of Levi near, and set them before Aaron the priest, that they may minister to him.
zh: “你要叫利未支派近前來，使他們站在亞倫祭司面前，可以服事他。

en: They shall keep guard over him and over the whole congregation before the tent of meeting, as they minister at the tabernacle.
zh: 他們要替亞倫和全體會眾，在會幕前盡上本分，辦理帳幕的事。

en: They shall guard all the furnishings of the tent of meeting, and keep guard over the people of Israel as they minister at the tabernacle.
zh: 他們又要看守管理會幕裡的一切器具，也要替以色列人盡上本分，辦理帳幕的事。

en: And you shall give the Levites to Aaron and his sons; they are wholly given to him from among the people of Israel.
zh: 你要把利未人派給亞倫和他的兒子，因為他們是從以色列人中選出來完全給他的。

en: And you shall appoint Aaron and his sons, and they shall guard their priesthood. But if any outsider comes near, he shall be put to death."
zh: 你要委派亞倫和他的兒子，使他們謹守自己祭司的職分；外人走近，必被治死。”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華告訴摩西：

en: "Behold, I have taken the Levites from among the people of Israel instead of every firstborn who opens the womb among the people of Israel. The Levites shall be mine,
zh: “看哪，我從以色列人中，揀選了利未人，代替以色列人所有頭生的，就是他們的長子，所以利未人要歸我。

en: for all the firstborn are mine. On the day that I struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, I consecrated for my own all the firstborn in Israel, both of man and of beast. They shall be mine: I am the LORD."
zh: 因為所有頭生的，都是我的；我在埃及地擊殺所有頭生的那天，就把以色列中所有頭生的，無論人畜，都分別為聖歸我；他們要歸我，我是耶和華。”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,
zh: 耶和華在西奈曠野對摩西說：

en: "List the sons of Levi, by fathers' houses and by clans; every male from a month old and upward you shall list."
zh: “你要照著利未人的父家、宗族，數點他們；所有男丁，一個月及以上的，你都要數點。”

en: So Moses listed them according to the word of the LORD, as he was commanded.
zh: 於是，摩西照著耶和華的命令，就是耶和華吩咐他的，數點了利未人。

en: And these were the sons of Levi by their names: Gershon and Kohath and Merari.
zh: 利未眾子的名字是：革順、哥轄、米拉利。

en: And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their clans: Libni and Shimei.
zh: 革順兒子的名字，按著宗族，是立尼和示每。

en: And the sons of Kohath by their clans: Amram, Izhar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
zh: 哥轄的兒子，按著宗族，是暗蘭、以斯哈、希伯倫、烏薛。

en: And the sons of Merari by their clans: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites, by their fathers' houses.
zh: 米拉利的兒子，按著宗族，是抹利、母示。這些人按著他們的父家，都是利未人的宗族。

en: To Gershon belonged the clan of the Libnites and the clan of the Shimeites; these were the clans of the Gershonites.
zh: 屬革順的，有立尼家族和示每家族；這是革順人的家族。

en: Their listing according to the number of all the males from a month old and upward was 7,500.
zh: 根據所有男丁的數目，一個月及以上，被數點的，共有七千五百人。

en: The clans of the Gershonites were to camp behind the tabernacle on the west,
zh: 革順人的家族，要在帳幕的後面，就是西方安營；

en: with Eliasaph, the son of Lael as chief of the fathers' house of the Gershonites.
zh: 革順人家族的領袖是拉伊勒的兒子以利雅薩。

en: And the guard duty of the sons of Gershon in the tent of meeting involved the tabernacle, the tent with its covering, the screen for the entrance of the tent of meeting,
zh: 革順的子孫在會幕中的職分，是看守帳幕、罩棚、罩棚的頂蓋和會幕門口的簾子，

en: the hangings of the court, the screen for the door of the court that is around the tabernacle and the altar, and its cords- all the service connected with these.
zh: 還有院子的帷幔、院子門口的簾子 ，以及院子使用的一切繩子。

en: To Kohath belonged the clan of the Amramites and the clan of the Izharites and the clan of the Hebronites and the clan of the Uzzielites; these are the clans of the Kohathites.
zh: 屬哥轄的，有暗蘭家族、以斯哈家族、希伯倫家族和烏薛家族；這是哥轄人的家族。

en: According to the number of all the males, from a month old and upward, there were 8,600, keeping guard over the sanctuary.
zh: 根據所有男丁的數目，一個月及以上的，共有八千六百人；他們要盡看守聖所的職分。

en: The clans of the sons of Kohath were to camp on the south side of the tabernacle,
zh: 哥轄子孫的家族要在帳幕的南方安營。

en: with Elizaphan the son of Uzziel as chief of the fathers' house of the clans of the Kohathites.
zh: 哥轄家族的領袖是烏薛的兒子以利撒反。

en: And their guard duty involved the ark, the table, the lampstand, the altars, the vessels of the sanctuary with which the priests minister, and the screen; all the service connected with these.
zh: 他們的職分是管理約櫃、桌子、燈臺、兩座壇，以及他們在聖所內使用的器具、簾子和帳幕裡使用的一切東西。

en: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest was to be chief over the chiefs of the Levites, and to have oversight of those who kept guard over the sanctuary.
zh: 亞倫祭司的兒子以利亞撒要作利未人眾領袖中的領袖，要監察那些盡看守聖所職分的人。

en: To Merari belonged the clan of the Mahlites and the clan of the Mushites: these are the clans of Merari.
zh: 屬米拉利的，有抹利家族和母示家族；這些是米拉利的家族。

en: Their listing according to the number of all the males from a month old and upward was 6,200.
zh: 根據所有男丁的數目，一個月及以上，被數點的，共有六千二百人。

en: And the chief of the fathers' house of the clans of Merari was Zuriel the son of Abihail. They were to camp on the north side of the tabernacle.
zh: 米拉利二家族的領袖，是亞比亥的兒子蘇列；他們要在帳幕的北方安營。

en: And the appointed guard duty of the sons of Merari involved the frames of the tabernacle, the bars, the pillars, the bases, and all their accessories; all the service connected with these;
zh: 米拉利子孫的職分，是看守帳幕的木板、門閂、柱子、插座、一切器具，以及負責一切有關的事務，

en: also the pillars around the court, with their bases and pegs and cords.
zh: 還有看守院子四周的柱子、插座、橛子和繩子。

en: Those who were to camp before the tabernacle on the east, before the tent of meeting toward the sunrise, were Moses and Aaron and his sons, guarding the sanctuary itself, to protect the people of Israel. And any outsider who came near was to be put to death.
zh: 在帳幕前面東邊，就是在會幕前向日出的方向安營的，是摩西、亞倫和亞倫的兒子；他們代替以色列人應盡的職責，看守聖所；外人近前來，必被治死。

en: All those listed among the Levites, whom Moses and Aaron listed at the commandment of the LORD, by clans, all the males from a month old and upward, were 22,000.
zh: 摩西和亞倫照著耶和華的命令，數點了所有的利未人；按著家族，凡是男丁，一個月及以上被數點的，共有二萬二千人。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "List all the firstborn males of the people of Israel, from a month old and upward, taking the number of their names.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“以色列人中所有頭生的男子，一個月及以上的，你都要數點；登記他們的姓名。

en: And you shall take the Levites for me- I am the LORD- instead of all the firstborn among the people of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the cattle of the people of Israel."
zh: 我是耶和華，你要把利未人歸我，代替以色列人所有頭生的；也要把利未人的牲畜歸我，代替以色列人中一切頭生的牲畜。”

en: So Moses listed all the firstborn among the people of Israel, as the LORD commanded him.
zh: 摩西就照著耶和華吩咐他的，把以色列人所有頭生的都數點了。

en: And all the firstborn males, according to the number of names, from a month old and upward as listed were 22,273.
zh: 根據人名的數目，一個月及以上，凡是頭生的男子，被數點的，共有二萬二千二百七十三個。

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Take the Levites instead of all the firstborn among the people of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle. The Levites shall be mine: I am the LORD.
zh: “你要揀選利未人代替以色列人所有頭生的，也要揀選利未人的牲畜代替以色列人的牲畜；利未人要歸我，我是耶和華。

en: And as the redemption price for the 273 of the firstborn of the people of Israel, over and above the number of the male Levites,
zh: 至於那超過利未人總數的二百七十三個，需要贖回的以色列人的長子，

en: you shall take five shekels per head; you shall take them according to the shekel of the sanctuary (the shekel of twenty gerahs),
zh: 你要每人收取贖銀五十七克，要按照人數，根據聖所的秤收取，就是按照聖所的標準重量 。

en: and give the money to Aaron and his sons as the redemption price for those who are over."
zh: 你要把那超額人數的贖銀，交給亞倫和他的兒子。”

en: So Moses took the redemption money from those who were over and above those redeemed by the Levites.
zh: 於是，摩西就從那些被利未人贖回以外的人收取贖銀；

en: From the firstborn of the people of Israel he took the money, 1,365 shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary.
zh: 從頭生的以色列人收取的銀子，根據聖所的秤，共有約十五公斤。

en: And Moses gave the redemption money to Aaron and his sons, according to the word of the LORD, as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 摩西照著耶和華的吩咐，把這贖銀交給了亞倫和他的兒子，正如耶和華吩咐摩西的。
